## 1.Augustine's Way-moeCTF

```
提示: 你有了解过移位密码吗？
描述: 
flag格式: moectf{xxxx} npfdug{f3tz_Bv9v5u1of!}
```

很明显可能是凯撒密码放入随波逐流，发现是偏移量为1的加密

moectf{e3sy_Au9u5t1ne!}

## 2.LazyRSA-moeCTF

```
描述: 
flag格式: moectf{xxxx} 含树：奥，我懒得解密flag了...你能帮帮我吗？
```

task.py

```
from Crypto.Util.number import*

p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)

n = p*q
e = 0x10001

flag = xxx
m = bytes_to_long(flag)

c = pow(m,e,n)
print("p = " , p)
print("q = " , q)
print("c = " , c)
'''
p =  7049120988661090136959367990211624032671088374397430253722914704672269343351268486642692858477617370573493581346846411168539408811542592351582581576539221
q =  11595461299251293002401295606096202123601375776115430944343338141843770078346355504245510150744085418550473572002573306023521368183889972175846278163010889
c =  
'''
```

题目已给p,q,c,e=65537,rsa解密

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import *
e = 65537

p =  7049120988661090136959367990211624032671088374397430253722914704672269343351268486642692858477617370573493581346846411168539408811542592351582581576539221
q =  11595461299251293002401295606096202123601375776115430944343338141843770078346355504245510150744085418550473572002573306023521368183889972175846278163010889
c =  
n=p*q
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
m=pow(c,d,n)
print(long_to_bytes(m))
```

获得moectf{w0w_yOU_Know_h0w_70_d3crypt_th3_RSA}
